seoTitle: Alectown vs Alexandria — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Alectown and Alexandria. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Alectown and Alexandria.
heading: Alectown vs Alexandria — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Alectown, New South Wales and Alexandria, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Alexandria has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Alectown (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Alectown or Alexandria safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Alectown has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Alexandria scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Alectown scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Alexandria scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Alectown or Alexandria?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Alexandria has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
